title: yagah #3013
definition:
1) to afflict, grieve, suffer, cause grief
    1a) (Niphal) grieved, grieving (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to grieve
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause grief, cause sorrow
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to afflict, grieve, suffer, cause grief
    1a) (Niphal) grieved, grieving (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to grieve
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause grief, cause sorrow

    NASB:  to suffer
